title: mediatransport
description: Hex Casting - Figura Server Backend interop addon
body:
mediatransport is an addon to [Hex Casting](/mod/hex-casting) and [Figura](https://github.com/FiguraMC/Figura) (and optionally [MoreIotas](/mod/moreiotas) or [Hexpose](/mod/hexpose)) that enables communication between hexes and avatars.

## Warning!
This addon (and FSB in general) only works on __dedicated servers__ (not singleplayer or Open to LAN.) Because Modrinth doesn't have a way to indicate "client + dedicated server only", this project is marked as "client & server".

## Setup
This addon relies on Figura Server Backend, which is currently only available in development versions of Figura. You can get your hands on a build directly from [their GitHub Actions](https://github.com/FiguraMC/Figura/actions/workflows/build.yml?query=branch%3A1.20) (note: requires login to GitHub.)

You'll need to install Figura, Hex, and mediatransport on the server.
